title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 29 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 29 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 29 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 29/08/2025
Today, the most-traded iron ore futures contract I2601 continued to hold up well, closing at 787.5 yuan/mt, up 0.77% from yesterday. Traders' willingnessto sell remained moderate, while steel mills' wait-and-see sentiment intensified, leading to a decline in the transaction sentiment index. In Shandong, mainstream transaction prices for PB fines were 775-778 yuan/mt, down 2-5 yuan/mt from yesterday, while prices in Tangshan held steady at 790-795 yuan/mt.
